## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves managing 3-5 client accounts, editing AI-generated content, and client communication](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Emiliano has extensive experience in AI-assisted content creation, editing, and team management](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Position requires balancing multiple clients, prioritizing tasks, and occasional client-facing responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [GrowthX is building in-house AI platform for content generation and workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Responsibilities

  - [Technical Managing Editor position within GrowthX's customer operations](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Manage 3-5 client accounts, each with weekly deliverables (≈10 pieces of content)](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Edit AI-generated content, ensure brand alignment, and prepare for client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Work in a pod structure: Content Manager, Managing Editor (this role), and Account Director](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Involves platform interaction, troubleshooting, and some client-facing duties](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

### GrowthX's AI Platform and Workflow

  - [Building in-house platform leveraging AI systems for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Workflow: keyword input → AI-generated outline → approval → AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Aim to create unified and agentic workflows for scalable content production](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### Emiliano's Relevant Experience

  - [Previously oversaw human writers using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Developed custom prompts and efficient workflows for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Managed 12-14 pieces of content weekly, plus oversight of junior editors](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Expertise in rapid content generation, editing, and AI output refinement](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Client Management and Prioritization

  - [Weekly client meetings (5 total, one per client)](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Prioritization strategy: new clients first, establishing guidelines and knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Focus on creating "gold standard" content pieces for each client](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Daily priorities: client feedback, assigned content creation, then editing others' work](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

### Content Types and Volume

  - [Primary focus on SEO-optimized editorial content for blogs](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Typical workload: 10-12 pieces per week, potentially more during high-volume periods](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Emiliano comfortable with higher volume based on previous experience (40-50 pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/7TdmbmzKDCE_Zx3syLJs_zi6buRbFCq6?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Next Steps

  - Emiliano to potentially share examples of previous knowledge bases for clients
  - Further discussion on specific client portfolio and content types if moving forward
  - Clarify any remaining questions about day-to-day responsibilities or team structure
